TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Lanyu Nsgan Lanyu o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 7.04 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 0 km², dxgal pmblxan o 43.17 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 5,035, sapah o 1,798, seejiq tnpusu 4,243 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 84%Yami . Yami ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Lanyu o niqan 4 alang ni maxal 6. 6 o, Ivalino , Iranmeylek , Yayo , Iratay , Imaorod , Iraraley . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: lanju nsgan lanju o gaga nsgan taituŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o *.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o * km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%jami . jami ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan lanju o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal *. * o, i*alino , iɾanmələk , jajo , iɾataj , imaoɾod , iɾaɾalə . pusupnjaħan patas

Yami ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Lanyu o niqan 4 alang ni maxal 6. 6 o, Ivalino , Iranmeylek , Yayo , Iratay , Imaorod , Iraraley . pusupnyahan patas
